channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Opposite no 17 hood Avenue br5 2ee, mattress & wardrobe and furniture and council signs dumped.- tree branches on the grass verges & hanging broken branch outside of no 7. The street/verges & kerbs is becoming littered with rubbish. Also at the end of the road T junction rubbish and tree branches are in the grass verge & the stairs which lead to poverest rd is used to urinate and littered with bottles & cans. Poverest rd from Marion crescent to junction of cray Avenue is littered on the pavement and verges. From number 6-8 Stanley way is littered with ivy cuttings from a garden in May Avenue & the pavement, verges & kerbs are littered with cans, rubbish bottles and more up to the bus stop on cray Avenue I have spoken to the men who empty the public litter bins and they have told me it gets picked up 2-3 times a week it doesn’t it is building up more and more, 16th July
item.description:
The area is a mess it is not being cleaned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Stanley Way, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped on public footpath, 16th July
item.description:
Dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bendmore Avenue, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 16th July
item.description:
2 large sacks of cement mixture on pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 319, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture and rug, 16th July
item.description:
Dumped furniture and rug

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Branch Place, Hackney, London

item.title: Household items dumped, 16th July
item.description:
Household items dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car rotting away, 16th July
item.description:
On where the cars are parked. The car has flat tyres and is covered in mould Even though the vehicle is SORN its on a public car space
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widecombe Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The area behind the recycling bins needs clearing and cleaning, 16th July
item.description:
The area behind the recycling bins especially the food waste bins needs clearing as people have dumped rubbish there over a period of some months. The bins need moving out and the area sweeping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colville Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 42 St Johns Road , Erith, DA8, 1PE, 16th July
item.description:
Bins haven't been emptied because they are over flowing with rubbish, 3ft wide pavement with wheelie bins permanently on pavement, now overflowing with more bags sitting in front of them leaving no pavement to walk on, with broken alcohol bottles and broken shards of glass all over the pavement, rats running up and down the pavement because of the filth that is left there, absolute joke, this has been going on now for over a month as i live next door to this property i cant even open the window in this sweltering heat because of all the flies, disgusting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Johns Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike dumped over the wall of Abbey Park Cemetery, 16th July
item.description:
I believe this bike was dumped here overnight, I didn't see it there yesterday. It has been thrown over the wall from Summerhouse Road into Abbey Park Cemetery. It could have been a getaway vehicle for a criminal fleeing or it could be a stolen bike.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Summerhouse Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hackney Borough Council: Please take note of one of the dirtiest streets in the borough!!!, 16th July
item.description:
There is constantly trash along Wharf Road on the side facing the A2Dominion buildings. Hackney Borough Council, please take note of this-it’s one of the trashiest streets in this area! it needs to be cleaned every day, not just when people write about it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wharf Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poo on floor, and vomit on wall, 16th July
item.description:
The whole area used to be jet washed regularly because it's often used as public toilet. But this hasn't happened in few years. Can the service be reinstated please?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balls Pond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A All out problem has been found, 16th July
item.description:
None of the Regular Traffic Lights at the junction on Brownswood Road and Green Lanes are not working at present - no signals are shown on either crossing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brownswood Road, Stoke Newington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Line Uber bike, 16th July
item.description:
At ///backed.heave.drops on Green chain Ealk - on trail between Lighthouse Nursery and golf course

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lawn Close, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vomit on wall, 16th July
item.description:
Probably vomit - it has been there for several weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A bag with clothes has been dumped on the pavement more than a week ago., 16th July
item.description:
A bag full of clothes has been dumped on the pavement in from of a private property’s hedge more than a week ago. Foxes opened it looking for food and there are now clothes scattered on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Dumped outside Hemmings Timber Yard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Hoddesdon Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Hoddesdon Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London

item.title: Drain rattling Pickford Lane, 16th July
item.description:
Drain rattling outside the Bakery shop. Every car that crosses the drain manhole rattles. Also one rattling near children’s spa shop in Pickford lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and other furniture abandoned, 16th July
item.description:
The usual flytipping, now a mattress and aome furniture. Over a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned couch outside flat 5, 16th July
item.description:
Couch/bed left outside gilwell court flat 5 for over a week. Not sure who it belongs too but it look horrible and it shouldn’t be there
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
